beforeSnapshot.name: getRoutePlan

points.description: Ordered points; index 0 is the origin (boat), the rest are waypoints

speed.description: Boat speed in knots (defaults to ROUTE_DEFAULT_SPEED_KNOTS)

startTime.description: Departure time in UTC milliseconds (defaults to now)

schema.description: Given an ordered list of points (origin first, then waypoints), returns per-leg distance, bearing, duration and ETA at the given boat speed, plus per-leg weather risk warnings.

200.description: Weather-aware route plan with legs and totals

502.description: Weather data could not be fetched for the route

beforeSnapshot.purpose: Validate a posted route (origin + waypoints + speed) and return a weather-aware plan with per-leg distance, bearing, ETA, and risk warnings.

afterSnapshot.name: getRoutePlan

points.description: Ordered points; index 0 is the origin (boat), the rest are waypoints

speed.description: Boat speed in knots (defaults to ROUTE_DEFAULT_SPEED_KNOTS)

startTime.description: Departure time in UTC milliseconds (defaults to now)

schema.description: Given an ordered list of points (origin first, then waypoints), returns per-leg distance, bearing, duration and ETA at the given boat speed, plus per-leg weather risk warnings and an explainable 0–100 risk score.

200.description: Weather-aware route plan with legs and totals. Each leg includes warnings/riskLevel and a riskScore object (or null when weather is unavailable): { score:0..100, level:'low'|'moderate'|'high'|'severe', headline, factors:[{key,label,icon,points,max,detail}] }.

502.description: Weather data could not be fetched for the route

afterSnapshot.purpose: Validate a posted route (origin + waypoints + speed) and return a weather-aware plan with per-leg distance, bearing, ETA, risk warnings, and an explainable risk score.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: The scorer needs the strong-wind + ETA-uncertainty thresholds assembled from config and passed through to planRoute; the schema should document the new riskScore field.
implementation: Extends the existing thresholds object (already feeding computeLegWarnings) with strongWindKnots/etaBasePct/etaHeadwindMult so a single object configures both the warnings and the score; leaves validation/Result mapping unchanged.
